text: Angular services are classes used to share logic and data between components. You inject them through the constructor.
author: Mary

text: Dependency injection means Angular creates the service instance and gives it to the component when needed.
author: John

text: A 404 usually means that the route path in your controller does not match the URL you are calling.
author: Anne

text: Use let when the value can change. Use const when the variable should not be reassigned.
author: Mary
